_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: Public-source review. Derived losslessly from the dossier data; nothing added.

identity.value: Krajský soud v Brně (Regional Court in Brno)

contradictions.resolution: The public register value (C 85425) is the authoritative one. The value on the company's own legal page (C 85424) is most plausibly a transcription error or a stale copy. This is recorded, not silently normalized.

contradictions.field: one label s.r.o. (IČO 02474727, Znojmo) — jednatel roles, stakes and dates for its three co-owners

valueA.value: Radek Juhaňák: jednatel + 30% stake, since 23 February 2022

valueB.value: Ondřej Kaman: jednatel + 34% stake, since 23 February 2022. Jakub Kaman: jednatel + 36% stake, since 2014

contradictions.resolution: Two independent research passes over the same aggregator mirror returned inconsistent role/date/stake attributions across the three named co-owners of one label s.r.o. Neither pass reached a raw or.justice.cz page directly — its search UI is JS-rendered and blocked automated fetch both times — so this cannot yet be resolved to VERIFIED_PRIMARY. All three names (Juhaňák, Jakub Kaman, Ondřej Kaman) are confirmed to hold SOME stake/role in the company; only the precise split and dates are in dispute. Recorded as a live contradiction rather than silently picking one version. A manual or.justice.cz lookup for IČO 02474727 would resolve this.

governance.note: The register records the statutory body and shareholders below. Marketing job titles on the website (e.g. CTO, CSO) are not the same as statutory officers and are shown separately. Not every website leader is a registered statutory officer.

shareholders.name: Radek Juhaňák
shareholders.note: Vklad amount from aggregator mirror, not a direct register fetch.

shareholders.name: Petr Faraga
shareholders.note: Newly identified in this pass — not in the original shareholder list. Shares a Znojmo address cluster and co-officer history (FaMe logistics, FaMe trade) with Václav Faraga; a family relationship is plausible from the ~23-year age gap but is NOT_FOUND in any public source.

shareholders.name: Jakub Kaman
shareholders.note: Newly identified in this pass — not in the original shareholder list. Also co-owner, with Radek Juhaňák and Ondřej Kaman, of one label s.r.o.; see CON-02.

signingRule.text: A statutory officer acts independently, except for acts of property management or monetary obligations above 200,000 CZK (excl. VAT), which require all statutory officers to act jointly.

marketingLeadership.name: Václav Faraga
marketingLeadership.corroboration: Also confirmed via LinkedIn (SRC-06) and as a statutory officer (SRC-03).

marketingLeadership.name: Radek Juhaňák
marketingLeadership.corroboration: Shareholder per register (SRC-03); statutory status not confirmed.

marketingLeadership.name: Lukáš Grolig
marketingLeadership.corroboration: Not found in the register statutory body or shareholder list in this pass — a marketing role, not a verified statutory office.

openQuestions: Filed financial statements (revenue, result, assets, headcount) — available at justice.cz Sbírka listin, not retrieved in this pass.
Whether the marketing roles CTO (Grolig) and CSO (Juhaňák) correspond to any current statutory function.
Independent client confirmation of the quantified case-study results (ROI, person-days).
Public-sector contracts and any EU-cofinanced project details (Hlídač státu and grant registers not retrieved here).
Combined Able+Blackfish headcount as filed (each entity files separately; Able's own filed revenue for FY2024 is now known — see financials).
The exact stake split and jednatel dates for one label s.r.o.'s three co-owners (Juhaňák, Jakub Kaman, Ondřej Kaman) — see CON-02 — need a direct or.justice.cz lookup to resolve.
Whether Vít Schlesinger's concurrent stake in Ventoux Studio s.r.o. (undisclosed in Able/Blackfish media coverage) has any operational bearing on Able.cz.
Why Lukáš Oslzla departed Blackfish & Co. in February 2024, 17 months before the Able.cz acquisition — no public source addresses this.
Whether Petr Faraga is related to Václav Faraga — plausible from the age gap and shared address cluster, but not stated anywhere.

All facts sourced to SRC-10/SRC-11 (kurzy.cz, Hlídač státu) are CORROBORATED via aggregator mirrors, not VERIFIED_PRIMARY via a direct or.justice.cz fetch — the firm/person *search* UI is JS-rendered and blocked automated fetch, though the Sbírka listin document index and downloads (SRC-15/16/17) did work directly and reach VERIFIED_PRIMARY.
